note: 値は一切含まない。変数名と用途のみ記載。

variables.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
variables.purpose: Stripe API authentication

variables.name: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
variables.purpose: Stripe webhook signature verification (general)

variables.name: STRIPE_FANCLUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET
variables.purpose: Stripe webhook signature verification (fanclub)

variables.name: STRIPE_FANCLUB_PRICE_STANDARD
variables.purpose: Stripe Price ID for fanclub standard tier

variables.name: STRIPE_FANCLUB_PRICE_PREMIUM
variables.purpose: Stripe Price ID for fanclub premium tier

variables.name: STRIPE_FANCLUB_PRICE_DIAMOND
variables.purpose: Stripe Price ID for fanclub diamond tier

variables.name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
variables.purpose: AWS SDK authentication (IVS, Chime, S3, CloudFront)

variables.name: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
variables.purpose: AWS SDK authentication secret

variables.name: AWS_REGION
variables.purpose: AWS region for S3, IVS (ap-northeast-1)

variables.name: S3_BUCKET_VOD
variables.purpose: S3 bucket name for VOD storage

variables.name: CLOUDFRONT_DOMAIN
variables.purpose: CloudFront distribution domain for VOD delivery

variables.name: CLOUDFRONT_KEY_PAIR_ID
variables.purpose: CloudFront key pair ID for signed URL

variables.name: CLOUDFRONT_PRIVATE_KEY
variables.purpose: CloudFront private key (PEM) for signed URL generation

variables.name: IVS_WEBHOOK_SECRET
variables.purpose: AWS IVS webhook HMAC signature verification

variables.name: IVS_STAGES_ARN
variables.purpose: IVS Stages ARN (for future stages API use)

variables.name: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID
variables.purpose: Twilio account SID for TURN server token generation

variables.name: TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN
variables.purpose: Twilio auth token for NTS API

variables.name: LINE_CHANNEL_ID
variables.purpose: LINE Messaging API channel ID for admin notifications

variables.name: LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET
variables.purpose: LINE Messaging API channel secret

variables.name: SUPER_ADMIN_EMAILS
variables.purpose: Comma-separated list of super admin email addresses

variables.name: ENVIRONMENT
variables.purpose: Environment identifier (e.g. production)

variables.name: google_oauth_client_secret
variables.purpose: Google OAuth client secret for user authentication

variables.name: AGORA_APP_ID
variables.purpose: Agora App ID (DEPRECATED - 使用禁止)

variables.name: MUX_TOKEN_ID
variables.purpose: Mux API token ID (DEPRECATED - 使用禁止)

variables.name: MUX_TOKEN_SECRET
variables.purpose: Mux API token secret (DEPRECATED - 使用禁止)
